steps.title: Calculate Total Volume
steps.content:
The total volume of the mixture is given as 38 mL. The mixture consists of both isopropanol and water.
The volume of isopropanol in the mixture is 10 mL.

steps.title: Determine Water Volume
steps.content:
To find the volume of water, subtract the volume of isopropanol from the total mixture volume:
$$38\text{ mL} - 10\text{ mL} = 28\text{ mL}.$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
